title: Announcement on Gold Imports with cash against goods payment method
bodyHtml:
Until a further instruction of the Ministry of  Treasury and Finance, it was found appropriate not to import unprocessed gold with cash against goods payment method.

In this context, imports of unprocessed gold with a Customs Declaration registration date of 15.02.2023 and later cannot be made in cash against goods. Unprocessed gold imports with a Customs Declaration registration date prior to the specified date may be delivered to Borsa İstanbul custody, provided that they are within the periods specified in the relevant legislation and the Precious Metals and Diamond Market Procedure.

Please click the link below to see the detailed announcement.

Announcement on Gold Imports  with cash against goods payment method
